# Anduril Industries and Team Lynx Win Contract for Phase 3 and 4 of the U.S. Army’s Optionally Manned Fighting Vehicle Program

Anduril and Team Lynx awarded contract for XM30 Mechanized Infantry Combat Vehicle program, delivering next-generation IFV with AI-powered capabilities.
